item.title: Giant Modulation of Terahertz Nonlinearity via Photo-Engineering Intervalley Transitions Mediated by Metasurfaces
item.description:
Publication date: August 2026

Source: Materials Today, Volume 97

Author(s): Chen Wang, Yong Tan, Yongzheng Wen, Shiqiang Zhao, Kaixin Yu, Renfei Zhang, Jingbo Sun, Ji Zhou

item.title: Emerging Mechanical Metamaterials for Future Civil Engineering
item.description:
Publication date: September 2026

Source: Materials Today, Volume 98
